block_02: Let’s celebrate the reunification of Vietnam in a trading competition!
block_03: To celebrate Vietnamese Liberation Holiday 2021, IQ Option has the honor to announce an exceptional tournament — the Liberation Tournament, that will be taking place on 24–30 April 2021. 10 best traders will share a guaranteed prize pool of $3,000
block_10: Join the Vietnamese Liberation Tournament and trade united under the flag!🇻🇳
